caption: In a brightly lit office or conference room, two women are seated at a long white table. One woman, facing away from the camera, wears a grey long-sleeved top. The other woman, facing her, has dark hair and wears a dark blazer over a white shirt. As the scene progresses, the woman in the blazer smiles and gestures with her hands during their conversation. The video alternates between showing the two women and displaying text on a dark blue background. The first text block reads, "Her passion for free market principles and firm grasp of the socialist calculation debate led Baetjer to know Kristine was the perfect fit for George Mason University and the MA Fellowship." The subsequent text block states, "During her time at Mercatus, Kristine co-authored and contributed to book chapters, journal articles, op-eds, and regulatory comment letters, in addition to supporting scholars with data analysis and literature reviews."
